headline: Assessing Best Buy (BBY) Valuation After Mixed Returns And A Widely Followed Undervaluation Narrative
summary: Why Best Buy Stock Is Drawing Attention Now Best Buy (BBY) shares have moved roughly in line with broader retail volatility recently, with mixed short term returns and a longer track record that includes both positive and negative periods for investors. See our latest analysis for Best Buy. Best Buy’s recent 1 day share price return of 0.3% and 7 day share price return of 2% sit against a softer 90 day share price return of a 6.8% decline. The 1 year total shareholder return of 9.5% contrasts...
